input_summary: Structured case intake example with submitted claims, evidence, uncertainties, and operational signal.

claims.text: A submitted case reports unresolved status visibility in a public-facing process.

evidence.text: The submitted timeline says the expected window was exceeded and communication channels did not resolve the case.
limitations: User-submitted account; administrative records still need verification.

inferences: Further verification is required before treating the claim as established.
uncertainties: The cause of the delay is not established from the submitted case alone.
narrative_amplification: Avoid generalizing from one submitted case to a full institution.
